post.description: This creates a named index for a target field, which can either be a vector field or a scalar field.

zh-CN.description: 为指定的向量字段或标量字段创建一个索引并为其命名。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`. If you are using a project endpoint, only a valid API key with sufficient permissions applies.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

dbName.description:
The name of the database that to which the collection belongs .
Setting this to a non-existing database results in an error.

zh-CN.description: Collection 所属的数据库名称。设置为不存在的数据库将导致错误。

collectionName.description:
The name of the target collection.
Setting this to a non-existing collection results in an error.

zh-CN.description: 目标 Collection 的名称。设置为不存在的 Collection 将导致错误。

items.description: Index parameters for a specific field.

zh-CN.descripiton: 针对某一字段的索引参数。

metricType.description: The similarity metric type used to build the index. For more information, refer to [Similarity Metrics Explained](/docs/search-metrics-explained).

zh-CN.description: 用于构建索引的相似度类型。更多详情，请参考[相似度类型](/docs/search-metrics-explained)。

fieldName.description: The name of the target field on which an index is to be created.

zh-CN.description: 要创建索引的目标字段名称。

indexName.description: The name of the index to create. The value defaults to the target field name.

zh-CN.description: 要创建的索引的名称，该值默认为目标字段名称。

indexType.description: The type of the index to create

params.description: The index type and related settings. For details, refer to [Vector Indexes](https://milvus.io/docs/index.md).

zh-CN.description: 索引类型及相关设置。详细信息，请参阅 [向量索引](https://milvus.io/docs/index.md)。

M.description: The maximum degree of the node. This applies only when **index_type** is set to **HNSW**.

zh-CN.description: 数据节点与其他节点连接的边数。此参数仅适用于**索引类型**为 **HNSW** 的情况。

efConstruction.description: The search scope. This applies only when **index_type** is set to **HNSW**.

zh-CN.description: 搜索范围。此参数仅适用于**索引类型**为 **HNSW** 的情况。

nlist.description: The number of cluster units. This applies only when **index_type** is set to **IVF**-related index types.

zh-CN.description: 数据集群单元的数量。此参数仅适用于**索引类型**为 **IVF** 系列索引的情况。

indexParams.description: The parameters that apply to the index-building process.

zh-CN.description: 应用于索引构建过程的参数。

data.description: Response payload which is an empty object.

post.description: This operation describes the current index.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可描述当前索引的相关信息。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`. If you are using a project endpoint, only a valid API key with sufficient permissions applies.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

dbName.description: The name of the database to which the collection belongs.

zh-CN.description: Collection 所属的数据库名称。

collectionName.description: The name of the collection to which the index belongs.

zh-CN.description: 索引所属的 Collection 名称。

indexName.description: The name of the index to describe.

200.description: An object that contains the detailed description of the current index.

zh-CN.description: 返回一个包含当前索引详细信息的对象。

data.description: Response payload which is detailed information about the index.

zh-CN.description: 响应载荷，为索引详细信息。

fieldName.description: The name of the target field.

metricType.description: The type of the similarity metric.

mmap.enabled.description: Whether memory mapping is enabled for this index.

zh-CN.description: 是否为当前索引启用内存映射。

indexoffsetcache.enabled.description: Whether to cache the index offset in memory.

zh-CN.description: 是否将索引偏移量缓存在内存中。

warmup.description:
Whether to load the index into memory when the index is created or updated.
  • sync: Warm up before a segment is considered loaded
  • async: Warm up in background after load
  • disable: Do not proactively warm up; load on demand

zh-CN.description:
在创建或更新索引时是否将索引加载到内存中。
  • sync: 在一个 segment 被认为已加载之前进行预热
  • async: 在加载后后台进行预热
  • disable: 不主动预热；按需加载

pendingRows.description: The number of entities/rows that are waiting to be indexed.

zh-CN.description: 等待被索引的 Entity 总数或行数。

indexedRows.description: The total number of entities/rows that have been indexed.

zh-CN.description: 已索引的 Entity 总数或行数。

indexState.description: The status of the indexing progress.

failReason.description: The reason for the failure to build indexes.

minIndexVersion.description: The minimum version of the index.

maxIndexVersion.description: The maximum version of the index.

indexParams.description: The index parameters used to build the index in a list of key-value pairs.

zh-CN.description: 用于构建索引的索引参数，以键值对的形式列出。

key.description: The name of the index parameter.

value.description: The value of the index parameter.

post.description: This operation alters the properties of an index.

indexName.description: The name of the target index.

properties.description: The new index parameters to be set.

mmap.enabled.description: Whether to enable memory mapping for the current index.

zh-CN.description: 是否为当前索引启用内存映射。

indexoffsetcache.enabled.description: Whether to cache the index offset in memory.

zh-CN.description: 是否将索引偏移量缓存在内存中。

warmup.description:
Whether to warm up the index.
  • sync: Warm up before a segment is considered loaded
  • async: Warm up in background after load
  • disable: Do not proactively warm up; load on demand

zh-CN.description:
是否预热索引。
  • sync: 在一个 segment 被认为已加载之前进行预热
  • async: 在加载后后台进行预热
  • disable: 不主动预热；按需加载

post.description: This operation drops the properties of an index.

x-admonition.title: Note
x-admonition.content: Collections for on-demand compute do not support this operation.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

dbName.description:
The name of the database that to which the collection belongs .
Setting this to a non-existing database results in an error.

zh-CN.description: Collection 所属的数据库名称。设置为不存在的数据库将导致错误。

collectionName.description:
The name of the target collection.
Setting this to a non-existing collection results in an error.

zh-CN.description: 目标 Collection 的名称。设置为不存在的 Collection 将导致错误。

indexName.description: The name of the target index.

propertyKeys.description: The names of the properties to drop.

zh-CN.description: 要删除的属性名称列表。

items.description: The name of the property to drop.

post.description: This operation deletes index from a specified collection.

zh-CN.description: 本接口从指定 Collection 中删除索引。

x-admonition.title: Note
x-admonition.content: External collections do not support this operation.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌。应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

dbName.description:
The name of the database that to which the collection belongs .
Setting this to a non-existing database results in an error.

zh-CN.description: Collection 所属的数据库名称。设置为不存在的数据库将导致错误。

collectionName.description:
The name of the target collection.
Setting this to a non-existing collection results in an error.

zh-CN.description: 目标 Collection 的名称。设置为不存在的 Collection 将导致错误。

indexName.description: The name of the target index.

data.description: Response payload which is an empty object.

post.description: This operation lists all indexes of a specific collection.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可列出指定 Collection 的所有索引。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`. If you are using a project endpoint, only a valid API key with sufficient permissions applies.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌。应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

dbName.description: The name of the database to which the collection belongs.

zh-CN.description: Collection 所属的数据库名称。

collectionName.description: The name of an existing collection. Setting this to a non-existing collection leads to an error.

zh-CN.description: 现有 Collection 的名称。设置为一个不存在的 Collection 时会导致报错。

200.description: An object that contains the names of all built indexes.

zh-CN.description: 返回包含所有已创建索引名称的数组。

data.description: Response payload which is a list of indexes.

zh-CN.description: 响应载荷，为所有索引名称列表。

ZillizVectorV2.label: Cluster Endpoint
ZillizVectorV2.prompt:
Use the cluster endpoint if you are using serving clusters.

  • Free & Serverless

    https://{cluster-id}.serverless.{region}.vectordb.zillizcloud.com

  • Dedicated

    https://{cluster-id}.{region}.vectordb.zillizcloud.com:19530

zh-CN.label: 集群端点
zh-CN.prompt:
如果您使用的是服务集群，请使用集群端点。

  • Free 与 Serverless 版

    https://{cluster-id}.serverless.{region}.vectordb.zillizcloud.com

  • Dedicated 版

    https://{cluster-id}.{region}.vectordb.zillizcloud.com:19530

ZillizVectorV2.label: Project Endpoint (On-Demand)
ZillizVectorV2.prompt:
Use the on-demand compute endpoint if you are using on-demand clusters.

https://{project-id}.{region}.api.zillizcloud.com

zh-CN.label: 项目端点（按需）
zh-CN.prompt:
如果您使用的是按需集群，请使用项目端点（按需）。

https://{project-id}.{region}.api.zillizcloud.com

AuthorizationHeader.name: Authorization
AuthorizationHeader.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`. If you are using a project endpoint, only a valid API key with sufficient permissions applies.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。如果您使用的是项目端点，则仅具备足够权限的有效 API 密钥适用。
